tasks.title: Fix Dockerfile COPY path for index.html
tasks.description: The Dockerfile at /Users/one-don/.eunomia/workspace/Man2/Dockerfile is failing with 'COPY failed: stat index.html: file does not exist'. The project structure has index.html at the project root (/Users/one-don/.eunomia/workspace/Man2/index.html). Read the existing Dockerfile and rewrite the COPY instruction to correctly reference index.html from the build context. If the Dockerfile does not exist, create it using nginx:alpine as the base image, with 'COPY index.html /usr/share/nginx/html/index.html' and 'EXPOSE 80'. Also ensure index.html exists at the project root — if it does not, create a minimal Hello World HTML file with a paragraph 'Hi, I'm Christian' inside the body.
acceptance_criteria: Dockerfile COPY instruction references index.html correctly from the build context root
Docker build command would succeed without 'stat index.html: file does not exist' error
